steps: The family has 4 skills: dnd-build (guided level-1 creation), dnd-check (audit a sheet), dnd-lookup (look up a rule/spell), dnd-help (orientation).
Grounding principle: never trust training data; every value comes from the catalogue (data/*.json) via engine/cli.mjs, with source citations.
If something is missing from the catalogue: 'Manquant documentaire' rather than inventing it.
